source.tone: Opinionated, raw, personal. Not a tutorial — a person sharing what they think, built, or learned.

cuts.name: hook
cuts.editorial_lens: The boldest single moment. Must land in the first frame. Pattern interrupt or provocative claim — a stat, a failure, a hot take.

cuts.name: core
cuts.editorial_lens: One complete thought — an opinion, a tip, a lesson. No preamble. Must stand alone without context.

cuts.name: segment
cuts.editorial_lens: A single complete thought with enough context to stand alone. Story-slide energy — what happened and why it matters.

cuts.name: arc
cuts.editorial_lens: Fuller narrative with context, tension, and payoff. Structure: setup → tension/surprise → insight → takeaway. Hook prepended to survive drop-off.
